column1: # NEW INC financials are EMBEDDED in the parent organization's Form 990.
# NEW INC has no separate EIN. The legal entity is The New Museum of Contemporary Art (EIN 13-2986881).
# What follows are the New Museum's parent-org top-line numbers per fiscal year.
# NEW INC line items are NOT separately broken out in any year. NEW INC sponsorship/membership
# revenue plausibly flows through the contributions line and (where members pay fees) through
# program-service revenue. There is no public 990 schedule that splits NEW INC out.
# Sources: ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer (132986881); FY ends June 30.

column12: Capital-campaign year — contributions spike from expansion fundraising
Stephanie Pereira appointed Director of NEW INC (May 2018)
COVID year — revenue down from prior year
Lisa Phillips comp $563875 (Toby Devan Lewis Director); Asega named NEW INC Director July 2021
Capital-campaign year — Mellon $1.5M NEW INC grant awarded December 2022
Lisa Phillips comp ~$825030; OMA expansion completes; Phillips retires April 2026
